big_picture: At A$8.45 – near its 52-week low of A$8.02 – Qantas is caught between a genuinely strong operational track record (H1 FY26 underlying PBT of A$1,456 million, up 5% year-on-year) and an acute fuel cost shock that has seen Brent Crude surge 48.3% in a single session to US$106.41.
